decisions.decision: Implement comments as create/read only via explicit GET/POST /v1/markets/{id}/comments routes, backed by a dedicated per-market discussion store rather than extending the event journal.
alternatives_rejected: Adding update/delete endpoints as part of this task
Folding comments into the existing bayes-event journal
Introducing durable storage just for comments

decisions.decision: Use a plain-text comment schema of {commentId, marketId, seq, accountId, body, createdAt}; accept POST bodies shaped as {accountId, body, idempotencyKey?}; trim whitespace, reject blank bodies, and cap body length at 2000 characters.
alternatives_rejected: Supporting Markdown or rich text formatting
Adding updatedAt before edit support exists

decisions.decision: Make comment POSTs inherit the existing protected-write flow and rate limiting through the trade_write category, allow reads for all market statuses, and allow posting only while a market is active.
alternatives_rejected: Bypassing X-Bayes-Agent-Id validation and rate limiting for comments
Allowing posting on resolved, closed, or draft markets

decisions.decision: Mirror the market event pagination contract for comments with ascending seq order and {fromSeq, limit, returned, nextFromSeq}, and render the discussion thread directly on the market detail page with a session-gated composer.
alternatives_rejected: Hiding the entire discussion section when no accountId is configured

steps.task: Add backend comment storage, ids/sequences, request validation, GET/POST handlers, service index updates, and protected-write category coverage.
Extend frontend API types, client methods, and React Query hooks for fetching and posting market comments.
Add a discussion thread and composer to the market detail page, including active/read-only session states and mutation success/error handling.
Add backend and frontend tests for comment routes, pagination, validation, idempotency, and market-detail rendering, then run the relevant suites.
